name: Amex EveryDay Preferred Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 15,000 Membership Rewards points after you use your new Card to make $2,000 in purchases within the first 6 months (as of July 2024)

earning_rates.notes: On up to $6,000 per year in purchases, then 1X thereafter

earning_rates.category: Eligible travel booked through American Express Travel

other_benefits: 50% bonus points when using card 30+ times in a billing period

sources.notes: NerdWallet review noting card is no longer accepting applications as of September 2024
Amex official benefits page with earning rates

notes: DISCONTINTUED - American Express confirmed in September 2024 that the card is no longer accepting applications. Existing cardholders can continue using the card. The $95 annual fee, 3X at U.S. supermarkets (up to $6K/year), 2X at gas stations and Amex Travel, 0% intro APR for 12 months, and 50% bonus points for 30+ transactions per billing cycle remain for existing cardholders. No foreign transaction fees. No longer available to new applicants.
